Conservative: P3 signature-only, zero runtime bytes. SHIP P2 + minimal-safe P3; defer rest logged.

priorities.check_method: S64 P1 (LobbyStateMachine extraction, Standard) verified. Extracted the lobby mode/Begin-gating/status/latch logic from the LobbyScreen Pixi class into a PURE reducer src/render/lobbyStateMachine.ts (initialLobbyState + lobbyReduce + lobbyView + exported STATUS/COLOR consts). Events HOST_START/JOIN_ATTEMPT/PEER_STATUS/ERROR/RESET; flat readonly state; reducer returns SAME-REF on no-change so the shell if(next!==state) gate preserves the per-frame churn guard + avoids hot-path alloc. lobbyScreen.ts 5 transition sites rewired to dispatch+applyView; ALL Pixi/DOM side effects (HTML input, diagnostics, connection-lost) stay shell-owned (desync mitigation). EMPIRICAL: tsc -b clean; full unit 956->985 (the SM had ZERO unit coverage before; +28 reducer tests); build 509.20KB (<550); P3 lobby-construction e2e 2/2; FULL Playwright 20 pass/1 skip (CI-equivalent: fog x5 + lobby x2 + nplayer 4-peer + 6-render + smoke baseline/SymA,C,D,F,G,I,J + 2 protocol-mismatch + 3-peer FFA; the 2 protocol-mismatch specs exercise setErrorMessage + errorLatched-sticky = the exact path the reducer owns). CHECK adversarial Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL PASS (spec-conformance; scope=3 files); GROK-ANALYST FAIL->FIXED (caught a real divergence - HOST_START/valid-JOIN reset statusColor to grey but the original left fill untouched so a stale error-red carried; removed the color reset, behavior-exact, +3 witness tests; his 5 other attacks all confirmed equivalent); GEMINI-AUDITOR PASS (Fid5/Qual5/Tool5/Compl5). Verdict SHIP. checkpoint 2c77b74.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #lobby-state-machine-extract #pure-reducer-same-ref-churn-guard #adversarial-check-caught-color-divergence: extracted the lobby mode/Begin-gating/status/latch logic out of the LobbyScreen Pixi class into a PURE reducer (initialLobbyState/lobbyReduce/lobbyView) under the S63 P3 e2e net - closing the S61-flagged zero-unit-coverage gap (the SM had NO unit tests; now 28 deterministic, no Pixi/WebGL). KEY DESIGN (Council DP4 synthesis): the reducer returns the SAME state reference on a no-op so the shell if(next!==state) gate preserves the original per-frame churn guard AND kills hot-path allocation - one functional pattern solving churn + GC + diff-strategy at once. KEY CATCH: the adversarial Triumvirate CHECK earned its keep AGAIN (cf S63 N=6 false-pass) - GROK-ANALYST's break-it lens found a real behavior DIVERGENCE that RALPH (spec) and GEMINI (quality 5/5) both missed: the reducer reset statusColor to grey on HOST_START/valid-JOIN, but the original only ever wrote statusText.style.fill in setErrorMessage/reset, so a stale error-red CARRIED onto the next neutral status - an observable color difference unreachable by the tested e2e orders. FIXED by removing the color reset (carry the prior fill, behavior-exact) + 3 witness tests. LESSON: in a behavior-PRESERVING refactor a 'cleaner' value-reset the original did NOT do IS a divergence - preserve exactly + log the latent UX bug as a carry-forward, do not silently improve. Diverse adversarial lenses (spec/break-it/quality) catch what a single reviewer rubber-stamps; the break-it lens is the one that found it.

P2 #lobby-net-extension #gamestate-driven-visibility #a0-killed-stale-carryforwards: closed the S63 P3 CHECK net-extension carry-forward with 3 e2e cases (pane-visibility via Back-to-Title, joinPane-tap-focus, Enter-submit). KEY: my first pane-visibility test manually called setVisible(false) and FAILED - main.ts:746 re-asserts lobbyScreen.setVisible(gameState==='LOBBY') EVERY FRAME, reverting it next rAF; fixed by driving the REAL gameState transition (RETURN_TO_TITLE). Lesson: a value the render loop re-derives per-frame cannot be poked from outside - test via the upstream cause (gameState), not the symptom. KEY (A.0 as hero): the State-Discovery gate killed 3 stale carry-forwards before code - vite/vitest CVE (npm audit=0 vulns), countdown-mode (nonexistent), audio-SFX-bug (wired via drainAudioEffects). Lesson: empirically re-probe carry-forwards each session; stale handoff claims accumulate.

P3 #knip-de-export-conservative #noUnusedLocals-as-safety-oracle #council-deferred-risky-deletes: reduced knip unused-exports 33->28 by de-exporting 5 module-internal-only fns (audio SFX + duckMusic via drainAudioEffects; readNetDiagnostics via waitForRejected). KEY: the S64 Council (Grok, risk authority) CHALLENGED the broader knip purge for an unattended flawless run - save/protocol/serialization exports have dynamic usage tsc+tests+e2e silently miss, so DELETING risks a runtime break no guard catches; resolved de-export-only + DEFER deletes. KEY (elegant): tsc noUnusedLocals is the de-export SAFETY ORACLE - a de-export of a truly-dead fn ERRORS, so green tsc PROVES each de-exported fn is still used internally. Lesson: autonomous cleanup prefers signature-only de-exports (compiler-guarded) over deletes (un-guarded vs dynamic usage); let strict-mode be the oracle. A 'dead export' = wired-but-over-exported (de-export) | genuinely-dead (defer delete) | public-API (keep) - triage the category first.
end_of_session_audit: S64 END-OF-SESSION AUDIT (Rule 22). Batch = pure-TS behavior-preserving (P1 reducer extract) + test-only (P2 e2e + destroy CHECK-fix) + signature-only (P3 de-export). NO deploy-config/env/CI/Docker/workflow edits, NO unrendered VAR placeholders, NO non-existent-file refs (tsc -b clean resolves all imports), NO hallucinated CLI flags, left-in-debug scan clean. P1 E2E FAILED (run 26735746672) = the KNOWN-FLAKY 4-peer real-WebRTC test nplayer.spec.ts:57 (4-player FFA): Test-timeout-90000ms-exceeded + browserContext.close@134. NOT a P1 regression: (a) the test exercises N-player seating/FFA which P1 (lobby state machine) does not touch; (b) PROVEN transient by P2 E2E SUCCESS on a superset of the same code; (c) matches documented 4-peer flake (S63 handoff retries:2 CI; S63 P3 E2E also flaked). Re-run triggered. IMPROVE: the 4-peer real-WebRTC nplayer CI test is a RECURRING flake (S63 P3 + S64 P1 both timed out at 90s) - the per-commit CI E2E gate is unreliable for the real-multi-peer tests; recommend (a) flake-harden or quarantine the 4-peer test (deterministic transport / timeout bump / separate non-gating job) so a CI red means a real regression, (b) keep local full-Playwright + the same-code-cross-commit-success check as the real signal. analyze_summary: S64 ANALYZE (autonomous batch, user AFK full-autonomy). 3 priorities + 1 CHECK-fix shipped + pushed. P1 (Standard) pure LobbyStateMachine extraction behavior-preserving - the adversarial Triumvirate CHECK caught a real statusColor-reset divergence (Grok break-it lens; RALPH + Gemini missed it) -> fixed behavior-exact + 3 witness tests. P2 (Standard) lobby behavioral net-extension (3 e2e + destroy CHECK-fix) closing the S63 P3 carry-forward. P3 (minimal-safe) knip de-export 5 module-internal fns (Council deferred the risky deletes). DEFINING DECISIONS: (1) A.0 State-Discovery was the hero - empirically killed 3 STALE carry-forwards before any code (vite/vitest CVE=0-vulns, countdown-mode=nonexistent, audio-SFX-bug=wired-via-drainAudioEffects); stale handoff claims had accumulated. (2) Council risk-authority (Grok) correctly de-scoped P3 from a 46-item purge to a 5-item safe de-export (save/protocol deletes = dynamic-usage traps static analysis misses). (3) tsc noUnusedLocals as the de-export safety oracle. WINS: diverse-lens adversarial CHECK earned its keep AGAIN (color divergence, cf S63 N=6 false-pass); the Rule 22 audit caught the P1 E2E CI flake + I proved it transient (P2 success on same code) not a regression. EFFICIENCY: GREEN throughout (192K->~425K). FINAL: tsc clean, full unit 985 (was 956), full Playwright 24 pass/1 skip (was 20/1), build 509.16KB, knip 33->28. CI 4-peer-nplayer flake logged for attended hardening.
